_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: MD/MS/ DNB/ PG Diploma or equivalent (in Ophthalmology)

preauth.label: Recommendation/opinion of 2 ophthalmologists for the procedure
Clinical Photograph of the affected eye
CT-scan/ MRI of Head (including affected eye)

claim.label: Histopathology report/filled specimen form sent for histopathology

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes including history (e.g. trauma, eye infection, other systemic disease), clinical symptoms, examination and investigations (CT/MRI of Brain and orbits/ B-scan of the orbits)?
Clinical photo of Affected part with Proper labelling of Affected Eye whether R or L with full face photograph?
Evidence of recommendation/ opinion of 2 ophthalmologists for the procedure?

cpd_claim.q: OT notes detail the steps of surgery performed (including evidence that amniotic membrane graft has been used during reconstruction of the socket, if applicable) and outcomes of the surgery?
Documents available to show appropriate post-op care, advise including for follow-up?
Histopathology / Microbiology report available for the specimen (except in case of Socket reconstruction)?
Evidence of barcode/ sticker used for socket/ implant?

common_queries: Recommendation/opinion of 2 ophthalmologists for the procedure is missing or not provided.
Clinical notes with indication, history, symptoms, examination, or investigation reports (CT/MRI) are missing or incomplete.
Clinical photograph of the affected eye is missing, not properly labeled R/L, or a full-face photograph is not provided.
Admission notes are missing or incomplete.
Histopathology report/filled specimen form is missing at the claim stage.
OT notes do not detail surgical steps or outcomes of the surgery.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for Surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, ophthalmic examination and does not respond to conservative medical therapy.
additional_information.procedure_description: Removal of intraocular contents of the globe
